display.purpose: Role reveals and overlay verdicts. Orbitron 900, uppercase, one per screen.

headline.purpose: Signature wide-tracked control labels (scan button). Orbitron 700, 0.3em tracking.

body.purpose: Quest prompts, instructions, telemetry. JetBrains Mono, document default.

label.purpose: Hints, badges, action labels. Rajdhani 700, uppercase, short strings only.

shadows.name: ambient-glow
shadows.purpose: Faint blue cabin haze under large primary surfaces. Atmospheric only.

shadows.name: active-halo
shadows.purpose: Blue corona on an armed/focused control. Default 'this is live' cue.

shadows.name: sabotage-glow
shadows.purpose: Red halo on sabotaged/danger surfaces. Color = state.

shadows.name: success-glow
shadows.purpose: Green halo on quest success surfaces.

shadows.name: overlay-lift
shadows.purpose: Lifts full-screen verdict overlays above the cabin.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Snappy ease-out for state transitions and contact feedback.

motion.name: ping-ring
motion.purpose: Expanding blue ring on loading primary buttons.

motion.name: crt-glitch
motion.value: RGB-split text-shadow + hue-rotate jitter, 0.1-0.2s mirror loop

motion.name: duration-snap
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for hover/active states.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Charged primary action. Hologram-blue fill that inverts to outline on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #58A6FF; color: #0D1117; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.08em; padding: 16px 32px; border: 2px solid #58A6FF; border-radius: 0; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.3s, color 0.3s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: transparent; color: #58A6FF; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgb(88 166 255 / 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #1F6FEB; border-color: #1F6FEB; color: #0D1117; }

components.name: Scan Button
components.description: Signature full-width armed panel. Breathes while idle, snaps on press.
components.css: .ds-scan-btn { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; min-height: 120px; padding: 24px; color: #58A6FF; background: rgb(88 166 255 / 0.10); border: 2px solid #58A6FF; border-radius: 0; font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace; cursor: pointer; position: relative; overflow: hidden; transition: background 0.2s; animation: ds-scan-breathe 2s ease-in-out infinite; } .ds-scan-btn:hover { background: rgb(88 166 255 / 0.20); } .ds-scan-label { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.3em; text-transform: uppercase; } @keyframes ds-scan-breathe { 0%,100% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.02); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-scan-btn { animation: none; } }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Translucent cabin-black field with blurred backing; focus brightens border to a blue halo.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 16px; background: rgb(0 0 0 / 0.5); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); color: #F0F6FC; font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; border: 2px solid rgb(88 166 255 / 0.2); border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8B949E; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #58A6FF; background: rgb(88 166 255 / 0.05); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgb(88 166 255 / 0.35); }

components.name: Buzzer Button
components.description: Compact red alert control for buzz / report body.
components.html: <button class="ds-buzzer"><svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M7 18v-6a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v6"/><path d="M5 21a1 1 0 0 1-1-1v-1a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h12a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1a1 1 0 0 1-1 1Z"/><path d="M21 12h1"/><path d="M18.5 4.5 18 5"/><path d="M2 12h1"/><path d="M12 2v1"/><path d="m4.929 4.929.707.707"/><path d="M12 12v6"/></svg>REPORT</button>
components.css: .ds-buzzer { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; min-height: 32px; padding: 6px 12px; color: #fca5a5; background: rgb(239 68 68 / 0.15); border: 1px solid rgb(239 68 68 / 0.5); border-radius: 0; font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s; } .ds-buzzer:hover { background: rgb(239 68 68 / 0.25); color: #fecaca; }

components.name: Role Badge
components.description: Bordered identity panel; icon and label both inked in the role's signal color.
components.html:
YOUR ROLE
CREWMATE
components.css: .ds-role-badge { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; padding: 32px; background: rgb(88 166 255 / 0.05); border: 1px solid rgb(88 166 255 / 0.2); border-radius: 0; } .ds-role-caption { font-family: 'Rajdhani', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: #8B949E; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-role-name { font-family: 'Orbitron', monospace; font-weight: 900; font-size: 1.875rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em; color: #2DA44E; }

narrative.overview: Every screen is an instrument panel held in one hand, at night, mid-game. The cabin is dark and the readouts glow; the player glances down, acts, and looks back up at the room. The interface is hardware: flat metal panels with hairline seams, characters etched in Orbitron, indicator lights in Hologram Blue. Depth comes from light, not from drop shadows. Motion is electrical: elements pulse while armed, snap on contact, and fire a haptic the instant they register. The scan->action->success loop is the emotional apex; everything else recedes around it. It rejects the cartoonish Among Us clone, the cluttered quiz app, and the corporate SaaS dashboard.
keyCharacteristics: Dark cabin (#0D1117) by default; color-scheme dark, no light mode.
Zero corner radius. Sharp panels everywhere; pills reserved for dots and tags.
Depth via neon glow and tonal fills, not drop shadows.
Orbitron display / Rajdhani labels / JetBrains Mono body.
Color is signal: blue active, green crewmate, red impostor/sabotage, amber caution.
Charged motion: armed states pulse, contact snaps, haptics confirm.

rules.name: The One Light Rule
rules.body: Hologram Blue is the only ambient accent. Green, red, and amber are signals that appear because the game state or a status demands them, never to add color.

rules.name: The Camouflage Parity Rule
rules.body: The impostor success flow must be structurally identical to the crewmate flow. The only sanctioned difference is the signal color and the haptic/glitch character, never layout, copy length, or information.

rules.name: The Etched-Label Rule
rules.body: Uppercase plus wide tracking belongs to Orbitron/Rajdhani labels and headings only. Never set body sentences in all-caps.

rules.name: The Three-Voice Ceiling
rules.body: Display is Orbitron, body is JetBrains Mono, labels are Rajdhani. No fourth family.

rules.name: The Light-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Depth is conveyed with glow, tonal fill, and hairline borders, never a soft grey drop shadow. If an element needs to feel raised, light it.

rules.name: The Glow-Means-Live Rule
rules.body: A blue halo signals an interactive, armed, or focused element. Don't apply glow to static decoration.

dos: Do keep the cabin dark: #0D1117 background, color-scheme dark, Readout White text. There is no light mode.
Do keep every corner sharp (--radius: 0). Pills (9999px) only for tags, dots, and ping rings.
Do convey depth with glow, tonal fills, and hairline borders. Light the element; don't shadow it.
Do reserve green/red/amber for real game and status signals, and keep Hologram Blue as the single ambient accent.
Do pair every interaction with a haptic and an instant visual confirmation.
Do give touch targets at least 44px and keep one primary action per screen.
Do provide a prefers-reduced-motion path for every animation; the scan-to-success loop must complete with motion suppressed.
Do keep crewmate and impostor success flows structurally identical.
Do keep body text at Instrument Grey or brighter; verify at least 4.5:1 on the dark cabin.
donts: Don't make it a cartoonish Among Us clone: no bean characters, no primary-color crewmate cosmetics, no toy-like rounding or bounce.
Don't let it become a cluttered quiz app: no dense menus, no long scrollable option walls, no settings sprawl.
Don't dress the organizer dashboard as a corporate SaaS admin: no cream/navy, no hero-metric template, no tracked-uppercase eyebrow over every section.
Don't use soft grey drop shadows or border-radius >= 12px on panels.
Don't set body sentences in all-caps; uppercase is for Orbitron/Rajdhani labels and headings only.
Don't add a fourth font family.
Don't leak quest information into the impostor flow.
Don't drop body text below Instrument Grey (#8B949E).
